name: io.github.AlephantAI/alephant-mcp
description: FinOps and BYO-KEY governance MCP server for AI coding assistants.

environmentVariables.name: ALEPHANT_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Alephant SaaS API base URL, for example https://api.alephant.ai.

environmentVariables.name: ALEPHANT_VIRTUAL_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Virtual Key for read-only, cockpit-scoped VK mode. Use this mode for developer-level cost and usage visibility.

environmentVariables.name: ALEPHANT_PAT
environmentVariables.description: Personal Access Token for Manager mode. When set, Manager mode takes precedence over ALEPHANT_VIRTUAL_KEY.

environmentVariables.name: ALEPHANT_WORKSPACE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Workspace UUID required with ALEPHANT_PAT for Manager mode.

environmentVariables.name: ALEPHANT_RATE_LIMIT_RPM
environmentVariables.description: Optional local HTTP tool-call limit per minute. Defaults to 60; set 0 to disable local throttling.
